evidence.title: Deep Learning Body Region Classification of MRI and CT Examinations.

denovo_summary.indications_for_use:
The Allix5 is indicated as follows: 
 
The Clairity Allix5 software device is intended to generate a 5-year risk prediction of 
breast cancer based on a bilateral screening mammogram. Allix5 provides a prediction of 
the percentage probability that the individual will receive a diagnosis of breast cancer or 
develop breast cancer within the 5-year timeframe following the screening mammogram, 
through analysis of mammography features and characteristics.
denovo_summary.clinical_study_summary: Clinical data records from each site were used to determine the ground truth. Ground truth for the cancer positive outcome within five years after the index screening mammogram is based on biopsy-proven breast cancer. Ground truth for cancer negative outcome at five years after the index screening mammogram is based on subsequent mammography and/or lack of evidence of a biopsy-proven breast cancer within the required time frame.
